name: Ray Brooks | Your Father's Friend
description:
**CW:** *AnyPOV | Heed the dead dove tag and always read all of the bot's description before playing with it | He's basically like a father figure | Although there has been no sexual or romantic attraction until {{user}} is an adult, it still feels like grooming | Boundaries Being Crossed | Obsession | Alcohol Abuse | Unhealthy/Inappropriate Relationship Dynamics*
----
╰┈➤ *If I wanna stay alive, you should never cross my mind. If I fall in every time, wicked love will leave me blind.* Ray might as well be like another dad to you, always there for you, even more than your own real dad sometimes. However, as you've grown older, you've sensed a change in him, a shift that neither of you seems eager to dig into.

----
**Recommendations:**
- gpt-4-turbo | [Generation Settings](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) | [Jailbreak](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit) 
- For the JLLM I suggest using [kolach3's](https://janitorai.com/profiles/7b679341-accd-43f4-a4a8-0904b7bc652b_profile-of-kolach-3) [advanced prompt](https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts). The JLLM is in beta; I am not responsible for and can't help with any issues that occur if you use it.
- For Claude, use kolach3's jailbreaks/presets for [Claude 2](https://rentry.org/pancatstack) and [Claude 3](https://rentry.org/pancatstack-cimb). 
- Always refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document whenever you're having issues first before complaining.
